scores.correctness_notes: Correctly shows event.relation.data[event.unit] for specific remote unit, iterating event.relation.units, and accessing own unit/app data bags. Matches gold standard core patterns.
scores.hallucination_notes: event.app is used for 'Remote application data bag' but the gold standard uses event.relation.app. event.app does exist on RelationChangedEvent, but the gold standard consistently uses event.relation.app. Minor inaccuracy but not a full hallucination.
